info.name: Nelvora Spell Fixes
info.description: Custom Spells for the Nelvora setting
info.author: RiverDoge

description.p: The next time you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack during this spell's duration, your weapon flares with bright light, and the attack deals an extra 4d8 fire damage to the target. Additionally, your attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20 for the duration of the spell.
At Higher Levels. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 5th level or higher, the extra damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

You summon a splash of saltwater to fall upon a creature or object within range. Flames are instantly quenched. If you target a creature, you make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes cold damage as determined by your Ik’héthagma Lineage.

You point at one creature you can see within range, and the sound of a low, draconic hum that resonates with the finality of existence fills the air around it for a moment. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or take 1d10 radiant damage. If the target is missing any of its hit points, it instead takes 2d12 radiant damage.
The spell's damage increases by one die when you reach 5th level (2d10 or 3d12), 11th level (3d10 or 4d12), and 17th level (4d10 or 5d12).
